title: Auto Feed Animals
description: Let the animals harvest and reproduce on their own!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Auto_Feed_Animals/BH_Auto_Feed_Animals_header.webp) Auto Feed Animals lets animals reproduce on their own and helps keep nearby crops replanted. Farming becomes more automatic, but you’ll need to till the same block twice to activate crop growth. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Auto_Feed_Animals/BH_Auto_Feed_Animals_description.webp) Auto Feed Animals changes how farms work by giving animals a more active role in their environment. When conditions are right, animals can reproduce on their own and interact with nearby crops, helping to replant them instead of leaving everything to the player. To balance things out, crop growth isn’t instant or passive, you’ll need to till the same block of farmland twice to activate it. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Auto_Feed_Animals/BH_Auto_Feed_Animals_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Auto_Feed_Animals/BH_Auto_Feed_Animals_screenshots.webp) ![screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qQAETE6z/images/0ec68c6b25d2b40cd15540714ecbc55d6a424c0e.png) ![screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qQAETE6z/images/d771921dfbeedbad7d32d6660463b8ae5131533c.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
